title: feat: add Stable Audio 2.5 (music) via fal
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Adds `stable-audio-2.5` text-to-music via fal.ai (`fal-ai/stable-audio-25/text-to-audio`).

- Ports #11912 (by @sharktide) from Stability's direct API to **fal** — no new direct-Stability provider; fal reuses the existing secret/registry path.
- `paidOnly`, `priceMultiplier: 1` (at-cost), **$0.20/generation** (verified live via fal's pricing API).
- Params: `prompt`, `seconds` (1–190), `steps` (4–8), `seed`; WAV output.
- `FAL_KEY` added to the gen secret allowlist + SOPS (dev/staging/prod); new `providers/fal.md` billing playbook.

Why 2.5 not 3: Stable Audio 3 is API-only (Large) on Stability, not yet on fal/Replicate — we'll add 3.0 Medium when it's on a provider we use.

Tested end-to-end on local gen → fal: 200 WAV, Tinybird `total_cost = total_price = $0.20`, cache MISS→HIT, clean tail.

Fixes #11897

gist.headline: The hive drops a beat
gist.blurb: Stable Audio 2.5 is now live on the API. Turn your text prompts into up to three minutes of pure musical vibes.
gist.summary: Added Stable Audio 2.5 text-to-music generation via fal.ai, supporting up to 190-second WAV outputs for $0.20 per generation.
gist.impact: Developers can now generate custom music tracks by passing prompts, duration, and steps to the new stable-audio-2.5 endpoint.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations.ai bee wearing DJ headphones, spinning a vinyl record on a retro turntable. Musical notes floating in the air. A chunky robot companion dancing nearby.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny DJ headphones, spinning a vinyl record on a retro turntable. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head dances nearby, with pixelated musical notes floating in the air. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
